HERO.SUBTITLE: Join a vibrant community of researchers, professionals, and students dedicated to the exploration and application of light.

HIGHLIGHT.EVENT_TITLE: Frontiers in Photonics, Structured Light & Optical Communications 2026
HIGHLIGHT.EVENT_DESC: Join Prof. Kumar Vijay Mishra and leading researchers for FPSLOC 2026. A 3-day conference exploring applied photonics, nonlinear optics, AI, and featuring student poster sessions.

ECOSYSTEM.DESC: Optica Cameroon unites professionals and students to advance optics and photonics nationwide.
ECOSYSTEM.SECTION_DESC: Led by researchers and industry professionals. We meet every second Tuesday of the month for high-level scientific exchange and mentoring.
ECOSYSTEM.CHAPTER_DESC: A dynamic community of students passionate about light sciences. We hold regular activities every second Thursday of the month.

RECENT.SUBTITLE: See what our community has been up to.

TESTIMONIALS.ITEM_1_TEXT: The mentorship program provided by the Local Section helped me secure a research position. The network here is invaluable.
TESTIMONIALS.ITEM_2_TEXT: Optica Cameroon is driving real impact. Their workshops bridge the gap between theoretical physics and real-world photonics applications.

CTA.TITLE: Ready to illuminate the future?
CTA.DESC: Join Optica Cameroon today as a member, or partner with us to support the next generation of scientists.

ACTIVITIES_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Discover our upcoming workshops, summits, and community outreach programs.
ACTIVITIES_PAGE.EMPTY: No activities found matching these filters.
ACTIVITIES_PAGE.EVENT_1_DESC: A gathering of industry leaders and researchers to discuss the future of photonics in central Africa.
ACTIVITIES_PAGE.EVENT_2_DESC: Interactive workshop introducing secondary students to the basics of optics using hands-on experiments.
ACTIVITIES_PAGE.EVENT_3_DESC: Our flagship annual event featuring keynote speakers from Optica International and local researchers.
ACTIVITIES_PAGE.EVENT_4_DESC: A 48-hour challenge to build innovative solutions using optical sensors and photonics components.

FOOTER.DESC: Advancing optics and photonics in Cameroon through education, research, and community engagement.

PARTNERS.SUBTITLE: Together we can build a stronger optics and photonics ecosystem in Cameroon.
PARTNERS.IMPACT_DESC: Your support directly funds events, scholarships, and outreach programs that shape the next generation of scientists.
PARTNERS.REASON_1: Gain visibility among a highly qualified scientific and academic audience.
PARTNERS.REASON_2: Associate your brand with international scientific excellence and innovation.
PARTNERS.REASON_3: Directly contribute to the education and empowerment of Cameroonian scientists.
PARTNERS.TIERS_DESC: Choose the level of partnership that best fits your organization's goals and budget.
PARTNERS.TIER_BRONZE_DESC: Entry-level partnership with strong local visibility and brand association.
PARTNERS.TIER_SILVER_DESC: Elevated partnership with co-branding opportunities at key events.
PARTNERS.TIER_GOLD_DESC: Premium partnership with maximum exposure and co-branding on all channels.
PARTNERS.FORM_DESC: Fill in this form and we will get back to you within 48 hours to discuss the best partnership option for your organization.
PARTNERS.FORM_SUCCESS_DESC: Our team will contact you shortly to discuss the next steps.
PARTNERS.FIELD_MESSAGE_PH: What do you hope to achieve through this partnership?
PARTNERS.FIELD_EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.

JOIN.SUBTITLE: Whether you are a student or a professional, there is a place for you in the Optica Cameroon ecosystem.
JOIN.STUDENT_DESC: Open to any student passionate about optics, photonics, or related fields. No prior experience required — just curiosity and drive.
JOIN.STUDENT_PERK_1: Access to hands-on workshops and lab visits
JOIN.STUDENT_PERK_2: Mentorship from senior researchers and professionals
JOIN.STUDENT_PERK_3: International Optica network and career opportunities
JOIN.PRO_DESC: Open to researchers, engineers, professors, and industry professionals working in or around optics and photonics.
JOIN.PRO_PERK_1: Connect with peers and industry leaders
JOIN.PRO_PERK_3: Shape the future of photonics policy in Cameroon
JOIN.FIELD_MOTIVATION: Why do you want to join?
JOIN.FIELD_CONTRIBUTION: How do you plan to contribute?
JOIN.FORM_SUCCESS_DESC: Thank you! We will review your application and contact you within 5 business days.

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Learn about our mission, our entities, and our commitment to advancing photonics in Central Africa.
ABOUT.MISSION_TITLE: Bridging Science and Society Through Light
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT: Optica Cameroon is the local affiliate of Optica (formerly the Optical Society of America), regrouping two officially recognized entities: the NASEY Central Africa Optica Local Section and the NASEY Optica Student Chapter.
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT_2: Our mission is to advance the science and application of light in Cameroon and Central Africa through research, education, industry engagement, and community outreach. We connect local talents to an international network of over 20,000 optical scientists.
ABOUT.ENTITIES_DESC: We operate through two complementary structures, united by a shared commitment to optics and photonics.
ABOUT.ENTITY_SECTION_DESC: The Local Section brings together researchers, engineers, professors and industry professionals to drive high-level scientific exchange. We hold regular activities every second Tuesday of the month.
ABOUT.ENTITY_CHAPTER_DESC: The Student Chapter is an officially recognized Optica student group at NASEY, providing students with hands-on exposure to optics. We hold regular activities every second Thursday of the month.
ABOUT.VALUE_1_DESC: We uphold the highest standards of scientific inquiry and integrity in all our activities.
ABOUT.VALUE_2_DESC: We promote open access to knowledge and foster an inclusive scientific community.
ABOUT.VALUE_3_DESC: We build lasting connections between students, researchers, and industry professionals.
ABOUT.VALUE_4_DESC: We pursue excellence in every event, publication, and outreach initiative we organize.
ABOUT.MILESTONE_1: March 2023 - Official launch of the organization's activities.
ABOUT.MILESTONE_2: Official recognition of the NASEY Optica Student Chapter by Optica International
ABOUT.MILESTONE_3: Launch of the NASEY Central Africa Optica Local Section
ABOUT.MILESTONE_4: First joint conference organized with international keynote speakers
ABOUT.AFFIL_DESC: Both our entities are officially recognized by Optica (formerly OSA), connecting us to a worldwide community of over 20,000 scientists, engineers, and entrepreneurs working with light.

CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Have a question, a collaboration proposal, or want to learn more? We'd love to hear from you.
CONTACT.INFO_DESC: Reach out to us through the form or directly via our contact details below. We typically respond within 48 hours.
CONTACT.LOCATION_VALUE: NASEY – University of Yaoundé I, Yaoundé, Cameroon
CONTACT.FIELD_EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
CONTACT.SUCCESS_DESC: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

RESOURCES.SUBTITLE: A curated collection of links, publications, and opportunities for researchers, students and professionals in optics and photonics.
RESOURCES.CAT_1_DESC: Access the global Optica ecosystem — journals, events, networking, and membership resources.
RESOURCES.CAT_2_DESC: Scholarships, travel grants, and student chapter resources to support your scientific journey.
RESOURCES.CAT_3_DESC: Peer-reviewed journals from the Optica Publishing Group covering all areas of photonics.
RESOURCES.CAT_4_DESC: Major international conferences in optics, photonics, and laser science.

RESOURCES.CTA_DESC: The Optica Publishing Group provides open access to world-class research in optics and photonics.

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.SUBTITLE: How we collect, use, and protect your data.
PRIVACY.SEC1_DESC: When you join Optica Cameroon or register for our events, we may collect personal information such as your name, email address, institution, and professional background.
PRIVACY.SEC2_DESC: Your information is primarily used to:
PRIVACY.DATA_2: Communicate with you regarding upcoming events and opportunities.
PRIVACY.DATA_3: Improve our services and tailor our programs to the community.
PRIVACY.SEC3_DESC: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. However, your data may be shared with Optica International for official membership validation if you apply for the Student Chapter or Local Section.
PRIVACY.SEC4_DESC: You have the right to access, update, or request the deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us.

TERMS.TITLE: Terms of Service
TERMS.SUBTITLE: Rules and guidelines for using the Optica Cameroon platform.
TERMS.SEC1_DESC: By accessing this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our platform.
TERMS.SEC2_DESC: The content on this website is for informational purposes. You agree to use the site only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of others or restrict their use and enjoyment of the site.
TERMS.SEC3_DESC: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of Optica Cameroon or used with permission. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
TERMS.SEC4_DESC: Optica Cameroon reserves the right to revise these Terms of Service at any time without prior notice. By using this website, you agree to be bound by the current version of these Terms.
